title: lavatera olbia var. hispida
intro: Lavatera olbia var. hispida, also known as the annual hibiscus or rose mallow, is a perennial shrub in the Malvaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lavatera olbia var. hispida include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and promoting relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
